passes.name: Static inventory and forbidden surface map
Constants, TypeScript types, and Zod schemas

source_invariants_enforced: Vouch is commitment-backed payment coordination only.
Both participants must confirm inside the confirmation window before settlement capture.
Provider state is retrieved before settlement-affecting operations.
Webhooks are idempotent and deduped by provider event ID.
No disputes, evidence, appeals, mediation, arbitration, manual awards, support overrides, marketplace discovery, messaging, reviews, ratings, browse, search, or public provider profiles.

completed: Deleted unreferenced verification/user helper modules where obsolete.

Mapped dashboard and Vouch-facing modules to content/theme tokens.
Replaced touched brand blue literals with primary theme utilities.
